channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Truecaller faces mounting pressures as growth matures
item.description: Slowing growth pushes Truecaller toward subscriptions, business services and new features beyond India.

item.title: What is Ethernet? Everything you need to know
item.description: Ethernet provides stable, fast and secure wired connections to the internet and devices.

item.title: Best iPhone charger: cable, wireless, MagSafe
item.description: Options for every user, from heavy screen time to constant low-power mode.

item.title: Pokémon 30th anniversary collabs: what to buy
item.description: From Uniqlo to Puma, top Pokémon merchandise available now and coming soon.
